# Apex Horizon Realty - Knowledge Map

*   [Home/Services](https://apexhorizon.com/en): Overview of our proprietary residential real estate broker service in London that achieves 12% higher returns. Includes an equity calculator, process roadmap, sector snapshot for family suburbs to luxury estates, and a real-estate agent comparison.
*   [Contact](https://apexhorizon.com/en/contact): Form and contact details to get an instant home valuation or speak with a lead strategist.
*   [FAQ](https://apexhorizon.com/en#faq): Common questions regarding the valuation process, flat fee structure, listing termination, and our lead strategist support.
